query: INSERT INTO peppr_service_requests (id, request_number, session_id, property_id, room_id, guest_name, guest_phone, status, total_amount, created_at) VALUES ('seed-req-001', 'REQ-2026-001', 'seed-session-001', 'spb-bkk-001', 'spb-bkk-r101', 'James Wilson', '+66812345678', 'DISPATCHED', 2500, NOW()), ('seed-req-002', 'REQ-2026-002', 'seed-session-002', 'spb-bkk-001', 'spb-bkk-r102', 'Sarah Chen', '+66823456789', 'SP_ACCEPTED', 1800, NOW()), ('seed-req-003', 'REQ-2026-003', 'seed-session-003', 'spb-hkt-001', 'spb-hkt-r201', 'Michael Brown', '+66834567890', 'DISPATCHED', 3200, NOW()), ('seed-req-004', 'REQ-2026-004', 'seed-session-004', 'abr-ptg-001', 'abr-ptg-r301', 'Emma Davis', '+66845678901', 'FULFILLED', 1500, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE status=VALUES(status); INSERT INTO peppr_sp_tickets (id, request_id, provider_id, status, sp_admin_notes, created_at) VALUES ('seed-ticket-c', 'seed-req-001', 'seed-sp-transport-001', 'OPEN', 'Airport transfer request', NOW()), ('seed-ticket-d', 'seed-req-002', 'seed-sp-spa-001', 'CONFIRMED', 'Thai massage 60 min', NOW()), ('seed-ticket-e', 'seed-req-003', 'seed-sp-transport-001', 'DISPATCHED', 'City tour pickup', NOW()), ('seed-ticket-f', 'seed-req-004', 'seed-sp-spa-001', 'CLOSED', 'Aromatherapy session completed', NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE status=VALUES(status);
